entries.title: Chibi Avatar Scrapbook Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Chibi Avatar Scrapbook Photo Prompt (Based on Uploaded Female Portrait)

Use the uploaded image of a young woman as the base. Do NOT add any new person. Transform the existing subject into a chibi scrapbook-style composition while fully preserving her real identity, face, hairstyle, long soft brown hair, natural makeup, black outfit, pose, lighting, and cozy indoor aesthetic.

[Theme Detection]
The scene reflects a cozy lifestyle / selfie / workspace vibe with soft lighting, aesthetic room elements, a motivational neon sign, and a laptop desk setup. Maintain a calm, stylish, slightly productive lifestyle mood throughout.

[Chibi Avatars]
Add 5-8 chibi mini versions of the SAME girl:
- same long soft brown hair (slight waves)
- same outfit tone (black top)
- same gentle, confident expression

Style:
- kawaii chibi sticker style
- big head, small body proportions
- expressive cute eyes
- soft pastel shading
- clean, high-quality sticker finish

[Chibi Actions - no repetition]
- holding coffee 
- working on laptop 
- taking selfie 
- relaxed leaning pose
- peace sign 
- thinking pose 
- stretching / chill pose
- smiling & waving 

[Sticker Placement]
- Place chibi avatars around edges and empty areas only
- Do NOT cover the main face or body
- Add white outline + soft drop shadow
- Slight floating sticker effect

[Doodles]
Add subtle scrapbook-style doodles:
- hearts, sparkles, stars, arrows
- aesthetic lines and circles
- soft glowing accents

Color palette:
white + warm yellow + soft pink (matching neon vibe)

[Handwritten Text]
Add 5-8 short aesthetic phrases:
- "just me "
- "soft life"
- "stay cozy"
- "little moments"
- "focus mode"
- "good vibes only"
- "create & grow"
- "be you "

Style:
- handwritten font
- white text with soft glow
- selective highlights in pink/yellow

[Composition]
- Center focus: real girl (unchanged)
- Surround with chibi stickers + doodles + text
- Keep layout balanced, clean, not cluttered

[Style Keywords]
realistic photo + chibi stickers, kawaii aesthetic, cozy lifestyle, warm lighting, scrapbook diary, soft glow, high detail, Instagram aesthetic

[Final Output]
A polished, high-quality, social-media-ready scrapbook image combining:
realistic subject + cute chibi extensions + aesthetic doodles

entries.title: Four-Panel Anime Book Recommendations
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished 2×2 anime-style recommendation collage set inside a cozy bookstore or library, showing four different young women holding books in front of wooden bookshelves. The image should feel like a Japanese social-media book recommendation post, warm, gentle, realistic in small details, and not every shelf should be completely packed with books; leave some natural gaps and varied book heights.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 composition, approximately 768×1024. Divide the canvas into exactly 4 equal panels with thin white gutters: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right.

Visual style: Soft detailed Japanese anime illustration, warm indoor lighting, muted pastel clothing, realistic wooden shelves, printed book spines with Japanese-style vertical titles, cozy quiet atmosphere, delicate linework, subtle shading, high-quality magazine-like finish. Faces should be intentionally obscured by soft square blur blocks, while hair, clothes, hands, books, and background remain detailed.

Layout and subjects: Include exactly 4 girls and exactly 4 featured recommendation books.
1. Top-left panel: A gentle girl with short black hair in low side buns, wearing a lavender cardigan over a pale floral dress, holding a travel/scenery book with a Mount Fuji and lake cover. Background includes a window with curtains on the far left and bookshelves behind her. Caption card text: "紫苑リンのおすすめ" / "『美しい日本の風景』" / "美しい景色を見ると、心が癒されます。"
2. Top-right panel: A girl with very long straight black hair and pink ribbon bows, wearing a pink cardigan, holding a fashion/cute-style book with a full-body girl illustration on the cover. Caption card text: "紫苑レイのおすすめ" / "『大人かわいいの作り方』" / "おしゃれは、自分をもっと好きになる魔法。"
3. Bottom-left panel: A short-haired girl with messy black bob hair, wearing a white hoodie, holding a dark science-fiction or adventure novel with a starry space-like cover. She points toward the book with one finger. Caption card text: "深絆アキラのおすすめ" / "『銀河英雄伝説 1』" / "壮大な物語に、いつもワクワクします!"
4. Bottom-right panel: A calm girl with long black hair loosely tied back, wearing a gray oversized sweater, resting her cheek on one hand while holding a beige lifestyle book. Add a small teacup on the table near the lower left of this panel. Caption card text: "黒波凪紗のおすすめ" / "『暮らしを整える』" / "シンプルな暮らしが、いちばん心地いい。"

Caption cards: Each panel has one rounded white caption card near the bottom, with a thin colored border matching the character mood: lavender for top-left, soft red/pink for top-right or bottom-left where appropriate, gray for bottom-right. Use centered Japanese text, bold title line, clean readable typography.

Bookshelf details: Fill the shelves with many books, but keep them natural and not uniformly packed. Include visible book spines with varied neutral, pastel, and muted colors; some spines may contain Japanese vertical text or simple series numbers. Avoid chaotic clutter.

Customizable details: The four featured book titles may be changed to 『美しい日本の風景』, 『大人かわいいの作り方』, 『銀河英雄伝説 1』, 『暮らしを整える』; the four recommender names may be changed to 紫苑リン, 紫苑レイ, 深絆アキラ, 黒波凪紗; the overall setting may be changed to cozy bookstore or library with wooden bookshelves; the illustration style may be changed to soft detailed Japanese anime illustration; the face treatment may be changed to soft square blur blocks obscuring each face.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 panels, exactly 4 characters, exactly 4 featured books, and exactly 4 bottom caption cards. Keep the text legible, preserve the Japanese caption wording, avoid extra logos or watermarks, and maintain a calm wholesome bookstore atmosphere.

entries.title: Rooftop Bar Night Cityscape Couple
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A wide half-body shot of two young people standing at the railing of an open-air rooftop club bar, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. She leans back lightly against him - both looking out at the city lights below, drinks in hand, a comfortable weight to the silence between them.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners, expression soft and open - the kind of face that appears when the music is behind you and the city is in front. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10-NC20). Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm rooftop bar light mixed with distant city glow, specular micro-highlights on her bare shoulders and collarbone, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. She wears a rose-gold satin slip dress on thin straps - the fabric catching the city light, hem above the knee, moving faintly in the night breeze. He stands close behind her, hands loosely on the railing beside hers. Two or three stray hairs lift and cross her cheek displaced by the rooftop breeze, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
Mixed artificial light sources - warm amber rooftop bar lanterns cast a soft glow across both figures from behind. The vast city light grid spreads below and behind them, bokeh points of orange and white light filling the distance. A light wind is implied in the fabric movement and lifted hair. The mood is gentle and warm - quiet contentment, a small almost-smile, sense of stillness above the city. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 3:2. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

entries.title: Cute Doodle Train Bento Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm photorealistic travel food snapshot inside a train, showing a fold-down tray table by a sunlit window with teal patterned seats softly blurred in the background. The central subject is a wooden oval bento box filled with white rice, furikake, fried chicken, tamagoyaki, salmon, simmered vegetables, sausage, pickles, and potato salad, with cute simple smiley faces drawn on several food items. Surround it with exactly 5 travel-meal items: a plastic bottle of bottled tea on the left with Japanese label text 午後の紅茶 おいしい無糖 Darjeeling ダージリン, a pale pink square pouch or napkin packet at lower left, a wrapped wet chopstick packet at the bottom labeled おてもと, a brown butter sandwich cookie package at upper right with the visible English/Japanese brand-like text "BUTTER SAND ITOKO" and Japanese handwriting above it, and a small pink snack box at lower right with a cute bear face and Japanese text. Overlay the photo with playful pastel hand-drawn doodles in white, pink, and yellow: exactly 9 handwritten text callouts, reading 美食好心情 near the bottle, 旅行便当 large across the top center, 完璧の小旅行 near the top right, "美味しい〜" in a cloud near the bento, "完璧な組み合わせ" in a cloud at lower left, "バターのいとこ" over the cookie, "旅行のお供にぴったり!" in a speech bubble on the right, "絶対に一口の価値あり!" near the chopsticks, and small Japanese text on the pink bear snack box. Add exactly 14 decorative doodle motifs: 4 hearts, 3 stars, 3 smiley faces, 2 arrows, 1 tiny camera icon, and 1 small bunny-like face. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle photo made charming by cute handwritten graffiti, with golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, soft shadows, and cheerful cozy travel mood.

entries.title: Kawaii Crepe Café Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic yet cute lifestyle food photo inside a warm sunlit dessert café, featuring exactly two large cone crepes in pink gingham paper sleeves standing upright in a cream metal holder with a small heart detail on a light wooden table. The left crepe is filled with whipped cream, chocolate drizzle, and crunchy toppings; the right crepe is filled with whipped cream, strawberry slices, small red berries, and a tiny smiling yellow heart-shaped cookie. Beside them are exactly two clear plastic takeaway drinks with dome lids and pale pink straws: one pastel strawberry-pink drink topped with whipped cream and strawberry pieces, and one bright yellow mango/lemon drink topped with whipped cream and yellow fruit bits; both cups have simple cute smiling faces and a small circular café logo reading "ANGEL CREPES." Add exactly one pair of round pink sunglasses lying in front of the drinks. The background is softly blurred with a large window on the left showing green foliage, peach-pink curtains, cozy wooden café shelving, stools, plants, and a pink framed crepe illustration on the right. Overlay the photo with hand-drawn pastel doodles and Japanese handwritten notes in white, pink, and yellow, as if drawn with a marker: exactly five main text doodles, reading 美食と いい気分, 超かわいい クレープ♡, 休日の バケーション, 完璧な旅, and 一口ごとに 価値がある♡. Include additional decorative doodles: hearts, sparkles, a sun icon, arrows pointing to the crepes and drinks, motion lines, and a dotted looping line. Use golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, pastel pink and cream color palette, cheerful vacation mood, realistic food texture, and playful kawaii handwritten annotation style.

entries.title: Travel Scrapbook Chibi Collage Creator
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the uploaded travel photo into a playful travel scrapbook chibi collage while preserving the original photo as the base image.

Keep the original photo recognizable and structurally intact. Preserve the main person's facial features, expression, body shape, pose, outfit, lighting, and real background. Do not replace the person, change their identity, redraw their face, or alter the actual travel setting. The edit should feel like illustration and scrapbook elements have been layered on top of a real photo.

Add 4 to 7 cute chibi-style mini versions of the person from the uploaded photo. Each mini character should be based on the same person, keeping consistent facial traits, hairstyle, outfit details, and overall personality. Use big-head chibi proportions, lively expressions, refined details, and a light cartoon-rendered look.

Make every mini character do a different natural travel action. Choose varied candid moments such as taking photos, walking while looking around, reading a map, checking navigation, pulling luggage, drinking coffee, gazing at scenery, posing near a landmark, crouching to notice flowers or street details, filming with a phone, having hair blown by the wind, looking around while slightly lost, or jumping happily. The poses should feel spontaneous and life-like, as if captured during a real trip, not staged.

Overlay hand-drawn doodles, handwritten notes, and sticker-like details to create a relaxed travel journal scrapbook style. Use mainly white and soft pink accents, with slightly uneven hand-drawn lines. Include elements such as arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, tiny airplanes, location pins, dashed route lines, hand-drawn circles, tape pieces, stickers, and small decorative marks.

Add 3 to 6 short handwritten English phrases related to travel mood and memories. Vary the phrases each time instead of using a fixed set. Examples of the tone include: "go somewhere new", "chase the horizon", "little moments matter", "memory unlocked", "lost but happy", "soft days", "just wandering", "no plans, just go", "take it slow", "follow the sun", "breathe and see", "quiet joy", and "this feels right".

Place the handwritten phrases near the person, mini characters, or travel actions so the text interacts naturally with the image. Avoid neat or formal typography. The writing should feel casual, personal, and spontaneously added to a travel journal.

The final image should feel light, healing, airy, cute, and relaxed, with a sense of freedom and travel nostalgia. Keep a balanced mix of real photo and subtle illustration enhancement. The viewer should first recognize it as a real travel photo, then notice the charming chibi characters and scrapbook details.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for creating cute chibi-style overlays for travel photos, maintaining the original background while adding charming character illustrations in a scrapbook aesthetic.

entries.title: ChatGPT App Cat Story Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, shown on a black background with iOS-style UI. At the top, display a header with a hamburger menu icon on the left, a rounded tab labeled "ChatGPT" in the center, and two icons on the right: a compose icon and a three-dot menu. Below that, show a row of exactly 3 rounded-corner photo thumbnails of sleeping cats: first, an orange-and-white cat sleeping on a fluffy cushion under a black metal chair frame on a wooden floor; second, a calico cat curled tightly on a pale green round cushion on a bed; third, a cream-colored cat curled up asleep in a brown plush pet bed. Under the thumbnails, place a dark gray chat bubble with white Japanese text that says: "これを良い感じにfacebookのストーリーに流せる感じにして。ばえるかんじで". Beneath the message, show the generated image as a tall vertical Facebook-story-style collage using the same 3 cat photos blended into one warm, cozy composition. The top section features the orange-and-white cat under the chair, the middle section features the curled calico cat, and the bottom section features the cream-colored cat in the fluffy bed. Apply soft beige and brown tones, dreamy lighting, light bokeh circles, subtle sparkles, and a gentle lifestyle aesthetic. Add cute handwritten-style Japanese overlay text and stickers across the collage: a speech bubble near the top saying "今日も おつかれさま♡", a vertical note on the left reading "みんなそれぞれ お気に入りの場所で", two small heart doodles near the center, and a large diagonal caption reading "しあわせ すやすや時間。". At the bottom-left of the generated image, overlay a rounded dark button labeled "編集する", and near the bottom-center place a circular download icon with a downward arrow. At the very bottom of the screen, include the ChatGPT input bar with a plus icon, placeholder text "ChatGPT に質問...", a microphone icon, and a circular voice button. Make the overall image look like an authentic captured app screen, vertically oriented, with a thin white scroll bar visible along the right edge.
entries.description: A realistic mobile app screenshot showing ChatGPT turning three cat photos into a cozy Japanese Facebook Story collage, useful for mockups, social media demos, and UI concept visuals.

entries.title: Healing Night Market Beer Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cozy late-night street-food stall photo in a Xiaohongshu-style healing mood-board aesthetic, showing a seated young woman with her face intentionally blurred, medium-long straight black hair, wearing a fitted deep V-neck ribbed knit top in warm beige and high-waisted blue jeans. She sits slightly angled to the camera on a red plastic stool, holding a small clear glass of pale beer near her mouth with one hand, relaxed and slightly tipsy, in a candid nightlife snapshot. The setting is a casual roadside food stand with warm, dim ambient lighting: a yellow tabletop in the lower left with exactly 2 green-label beer bottles, 1 plastic cup with beer foam, 1 colorful cigarette pack, and small scraps of napkin or paper; behind her is exactly 1 old electric fan placed on top of 1 white appliance box, a translucent plastic sheet curtain hanging behind her, and exactly 2 red plastic stools visible in the background. On the right side is a small vendor counter area with shelves, cups, and red cans, plus a partial illuminated sign. Add hand-drawn white doodle outlines around the woman and objects, with arrows, sparkles, hearts, swirls, and handwritten Chinese annotations placed all around the image like emotional captions. Include exactly 10 text callouts in Chinese: "老式风扇呼呼转着~有种怀旧感♡", "塑胶布帘隔开的小空间 反而更有安全感~", "路边小摊 人间烟火气 最抚慰人心~", "冰凉的啤酒 苦中带甘~ 越喝越放松!", "小口慢慢喝~ 让自己 稍微放空一下♡", "杯子里的泡泡 像小小的快乐 慢慢消失~", "今晚有点微醺... 心情刚刚好 什么烦恼都 先放一边吧♡", "舒服的穿搭 自在又放松~ 做自己最重要♡", "高腰牛仔裤 修饰比例 也很有安全感!", and a large cloud-shaped caption near the bottom left reading "生活偶尔需要 一点微醺的小确幸~ 今天也要好好爱自己♡". Use a realistic mobile-phone photo look with cinematic contrast, glossy highlights on skin and hair, slightly cramped composition, intimate street-night atmosphere, and a soft but sharp editorial finish. Keep the handwritten notes bright white and clearly legible, integrated naturally over the photo.

entries.title: Cozy Beer Toast with Oden
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, cozy Japanese home evening scene photographed in a natural lifestyle style. In the foreground, a right hand holds up a tall clear pint glass of golden beer with a thick creamy white foam head, positioned slightly right of center as if making a solo toast. In the softly blurred background, a small clay pot of oden simmers on a portable tabletop gas stove, with clearly visible ingredients including 1 shiitake mushroom, 2 round white items, several tofu pieces, and other assorted simmered items in broth. The setting is a tatami room with warm ambient indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, and a relaxed intimate atmosphere. Overlay large white handwritten Japanese text across the image reading 今日も\nおつかれさま。, in an emotional hand-drawn marker style with uneven strokes, casual spacing, and a personal note-like feel. Emphasize comforting colors, soft bokeh, realistic skin tones, and the contrast between the crisp beer glass and the gently out-of-focus hot pot behind it.

entries.title: Taiwan Breakfast Shop Candid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid street-side cafe photo of a young East Asian woman seated at a small round table inside a modest Taiwanese breakfast shop, shot in bright natural daylight with realistic smartphone-camera styling. She has long dark brown to black wavy hair draped over her shoulders and back, a slim curvy figure, and wears a fitted white ribbed scoop-neck crop tank top and light gray drawstring sweatpants, plus a very delicate necklace. She is sitting slightly leaned forward toward the camera, with one hand holding a Taiwanese rice roll wrapped in clear plastic close to her mouth as if about to take a bite. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large rectangular blur block centered over the face. On the table in the lower left foreground is 1 large plastic takeaway cup with a sealed lid and straw, filled with a light beige milk tea or soy milk drink, printed with cute cartoon characters and small Chinese text. Also on the table is 1 white paper food bag with orange printing. The setting is a real casual breakfast shop interior: at the far left is a window opening to the street with daylight, leafy shadows, parked scooters, and a white car visible outside; on the left wall is 1 vertical vintage menu sign with multicolored Chinese characters listing breakfast items and drinks; along the top background is 1 wide horizontal menu board filled with many rows of blue and red Chinese text and prices; in the back right is an open stainless-steel kitchen counter area with 1 blurred worker standing behind it and additional Chinese signage on the metal fixtures. Composition is medium shot, centered on the seated woman, with soft natural shadows, slightly warm tones, realistic skin texture, everyday documentary atmosphere, and an authentic Taiwanese local eatery aesthetic.

entries.title: Xinjiang Road Trip Scrapbook Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, handcrafted travel scrapbook spread photographed from directly above on a wooden tabletop, showing an open two-page journal with thick deckled paper edges and layered fabric tabs peeking out from the sides. The style is a realistic mixed-media travel diary with watercolor map art, handwritten Chinese titles, taped instant photos, doodles, and soft natural light. On the upper left page, write the date "2024.09.20." in small handwriting and a large black brush-style Chinese title reading 新疆公路旅行手帐. Arrange 5 Polaroid-style instant photos across the spread, each slightly tilted and attached with beige or patterned washi tape: 1 photo at upper left showing two travelers by a blue alpine lake labeled "天山天池"; 1 tall photo near upper center-left showing three people on a green grassland labeled "那拉提草原"; 1 photo at lower left showing a couple by a deep blue lake labeled "赛里木湖"; 1 photo at upper center-right showing two travelers on a long empty road under a bright blue sky labeled "沙漠公路"; 1 photo at lower center showing two figures standing on dunes at sunset labeled "日落沙丘". Add small handwritten bilingual place annotations near the left-page photos: "天山天池 (Tianshan Tianchi)", "赛拉木草原 (Sayram Lake)", "沙漠公路 (Desert Highway)", and "日落沙丘 (Sunset Dunes)" in a casual notebook style. On the right page, paint a loose watercolor map of Xinjiang in beige, pale green, and blue, with a bold winding blue road route crossing the region and exactly 10 red location pins placed along the route. entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody, dark restaurant table photo styled like a trendy handwritten doodle edit, shot from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. Use thin white chalk-like lines, casual imperfect handwriting, and a cozy editorial social-media aesthetic, keeping the composition realistic and photographic while the doodles look playful and hand-sketched.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed, whimsical anime cafe illustration in a vertical composition, featuring a chibi girl mascot standing at the center of a cozy fantasy coffee shop during golden sunrise. She has extremely long, voluminous hair with a vivid rainbow gradient that begins as deep blue at the crown and flows through cyan, green, yellow, orange, pink, and purple at the tips, with glossy highlights and thick bangs framing large sparkling blue eyes. She wears oversized silver headphones with green four-leaf clover emblems on both earcups, a red leather jacket, a white T-shirt with a yellow smiley face, fitted blue jeans, and white high-top sneakers with red accents. She smiles warmly and holds a white coffee mug decorated with a green clover symbol. Add a speech bubble near her head containing Japanese text: おはよう。今日も、ひとくち目の幸せから。. The cafe interior is richly decorated with dark polished wood, hanging banners, shelves filled with glass bottles and jars, trailing green plants, glowing crystal ornaments, and warm amber lighting. In the right background, place tall arched windows showing a dreamy pastel sunrise sky and storybook castle-like towers outside. Include exactly 2 mascot creatures: 1 small blue penguin barista on the left beside stacked clover mugs, and 1 small black cat-like creature with tiny bat wings and a red bow tie near a chalkboard sign on the lower right. In the foreground on a round table, show exactly 4 featured food and drink items: 1 thick slice of toast topped with a green clover garnish, 1 cup of latte art coffee in a clover cup, 1 glass jar of honey, and 1 tall rainbow parfait layered with colorful jelly, whipped cream, berries, strawberry slices, and crystal-like candy shards. Also place a teapot and additional clover-pattern cups on side tables in the midground. Add a small standing chalkboard sign on the lower right with Japanese welcome text and the cafe name. The whole image should feel magical, cheerful, polished, and richly rendered, with soft sparkles, warm morning light, saturated colors, intricate decorative details, and premium gpt-image-2 anime illustration quality.

entries.title: Nostalgic 2003 Family Apartment Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, unprocessed indoor photograph taken with an early 2000s consumer digital camera or cheap film camera. The image features a cheerful Chinese family of three in their modest Beijing apartment living room circa 2003. A mother, father, and young daughter (around 6) are captured in a cluttered, genuine setting. The mother is looking up, surprised and smiling, while the father is trying to fix an old VCR player, and the daughter is playing with a colorful toy car on the patterned rug. The shot is clearly spontaneous, taken with poor, natural window light from the right. The composition is off-center, slightly blurry and grainy with muted, washed-out colors and a yellowish tint. In the background, there's a bulky beige TV showing static, a wall calendar from 2003, cluttered shelves with VHS tapes, framed family pictures, a cloth sofa, and maybe a small plant. The perspective is from eye level but feels handheld and shaky. The focus is soft, and the depth of field is shallow, emphasizing the natural moment. Shot with an old Nikon Coolpix or Canon PowerShot, visible digital noise and a time-stamp in a corner. The shot captures a slice of mundane, everyday life, with the daughter's messy hair and toys scattered, creating an authentic, memory-like feel.

entries.title: Toucan Dermatologist Diary Manga
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a warm, emotional autobiographical single-page manga/illustrated essay about a kind dermatologist who has literally become an anthropomorphic toucan, combining skincare advice, gentle self-reflection, and everyday notes.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 page, off-white textured watercolor paper with thin hand-drawn panel borders, soft muted colors, delicate ink linework, Japanese slice-of-life zine aesthetic, cozy and slightly nostalgic.

Main character: An anthropomorphic toucan doctor with a large yellow-orange-and-black beak, blue-green head feathers, expressive round eye, and dark bird hands. He wears a white lab coat over a muted teal shirt in indoor scenes, and a dusty pink hoodie with a backpack in outdoor scenes. The hoodie back has a small circular emblem with Japanese writing. His mood is calm, thoughtful, humble, and kind.

Layout: Use exactly 6 main comic panels plus 1 decorative footer strip. Panel 1 is a large top panel occupying about the upper third: the toucan doctor sits at a wooden desk in a sunlit study, writing in an open notebook. Include a desk lamp, stacked books, papers pinned to the wall, leafy window, potted plant, coffee mug with a flower, and a taped Polaroid-style photo at left showing the same toucan in a pink hoodie holding a sign. Panel 2 is a small lower-left close-up of a gloved hand pointing at a small skin-chart note on a clipboard. Panel 3 is a small center panel showing the toucan in profile by a leafy window holding the flower mug, with a rounded speech/thought bubble. Panel 4 is a small lower-right notebook panel with a paperclip and pen, showing a checklist with three checked items. Panel 5 is a wide forest panel: the toucan in pink hoodie looks through binoculars among pale green trees and falling leaves, with reflective handwritten text at left. Panel 6 is a wide rooftop/city panel: the toucan sits from behind on a ledge facing a pale city skyline, with a paper airplane in the sky, plant pot, mug, small faucet or pipe, taped note at right, and speech bubble near the character. Footer strip at the very bottom contains exactly 5 small captioned icons: a microscope, a laptop computer, a camera, a coffee cup, and a handwritten thank-you note with a tiny heart.

Text content: Add Japanese handwritten captions in a soft ink style, using this text as the overall copy: 皮膚科のこと、日常のこと。ちょっとした気づきのメモ。今日も、誰かの役に立つひとつを。知識は命。わかりやすくて、ためになる。それがいちばんうれしい。肌は、正直。暮らしのサインが、ちゃんと出る。専門のこと、むずかしいこともやさしく届けたいんだよね。今日のメモ つたえる つくる つながる ぜんぶ、だいじ。いいものはちゃんと、静かに、つづいていく。流行より、本質を見たい。皮膚は、暮らしの鏡。整えることは、自分をたいせつにすること。今日も、自分にも誰かにも、やさしくね。さぁ、次はどんな話を届けようかな。ものづくりと発信で、ちょっといい明日を。研究も好き。AIも相棒。旅と自然にインプット。珈琲でリセット。Thank you! いつもありがとう。 Keep the text handwritten, slightly imperfect, and integrated naturally into the panels rather than typeset.

Style constraints: Fine pen-and-watercolor illustration, visible paper grain, soft beige shadows, muted teal/green/pink palette, cozy desk clutter, gentle sunlight, no glossy digital rendering, no harsh outlines, no photorealism. Keep the tone poetic and quietly encouraging. Use anthropomorphic toucan dermatologist as the central figure, warm reflective Japanese diary manga, muted watercolor beige, teal, dusty pink, soft green, warm ochre, and skincare wisdom, daily observations, kindness, and thoughtful creation.

entries.title: Anime World Building and Character Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Desired Output]
World-building Setting Materials + Original Anime Character Setting Materials
*Please visualize not only the character but also the environment, culture, systems, technology, and sense of daily life of the world in which the character lives.

[Worldview Seed]
Enter here

[Number of Proposals]
Enter here
*E.g., only 1 proposal / wish to compare multiple proposals, etc.

[Number of Characters]
Enter here

[Roles/Occupations]
Enter here

[Setting/Environment]
Enter here
*If details are sparse, design new parameters for climate, terrain, resources, dangers, transportation, and housing styles based on the input keywords.

[Society/Systems]
Enter here
*Design community rules, division of labor, status markers, affiliation marks, exchange methods, and rituals that fit the input.

[Technology/Faith/Taboos]
Enter here
*Derive material processing, recording methods, communication, prayers, taboos, festivals, and body decorations naturally from the input content.

[Lifestyle/Culture]
Enter here
*Housing, diet, transportation, work tools, clothing styles, meaning of ornaments, seasonal events, currency, script, emblems, etc.

[Overall Atmosphere]
Enter here

[Characteristics of the World]
Enter here

[Key Priorities]
Enter here

[Finish Direction]
Enter here
*E.g., emphasize realism/life-like feel, emphasize mysticism, emphasize practical utility of costumes, focus more on architecture, target bright children's content, etc.

[Differentiation Instructions]
Enter here

[Drawing Tone]
Smooth line art, flat anime coloring, minimal cel shading, single-level shadows, no gradients, no thick painting, no realistic texture expressions, no strong light/shadow effects, flat look optimized for animation.

[Anime Conversion Instructions]
While maintaining the structure, motifs, color scheme, roles, and cultural meanings of the original design, simplify the drawing for production animation. Use flat anime coloring and keep shadows to one level. Treat translucent materials or thin fabrics as simplified surfaces in a cel-shaded style rather than realistic textures.

Based on the input above, create an image in the style of "World-building Setting Materials + Character Setting Materials" for an original anime.

Purpose:
To visually communicate the world itself in which the character lives, rather than just the character alone. Create setting materials where the world's environment, culture, lifestyle tools, architecture, transportation, and the origins of clothing appear as a unified whole.

Most Important:
First, extract a "visual rule" unique to that world from the input content. Reflect that visual rule in everything: backgrounds, architecture, tools, costumes, color schemes, materials, emblems, and the overall page layout.

Desired Finish:
- Clothing, tools, and housing should look like things actually used by people living in this world.
- Characters, backgrounds, tools, text, and material samples should appear to belong to the same cultural sphere.
- Convey unique environments, resources, and lifestyle habits born from the worldview seed.
- Shapes should arise from necessity in daily life rather than existing genre tropes.
- Feature a unique shape language, color palette, and material feel recognizable at a glance.

Thought Process:
1. Determine the world's "Environment" from input (climate, terrain, light, seasons, dangers, resource distribution).
2. Determine "Lifestyle" from environment (housing, food, work, transport, storage, exchange, recording, celebrations).
3. Determine "Clothing and Tools" from lifestyle (fastening, layering, carrying, protection, showing status/role).
4. Determine "Character Appearance" from clothing/tools (focus on outfits, equipment, materials, colors, and silhouettes rather than just face/hair).
5. Determine "Page Design" from visual rules (reflect recording media, patterns, white space, and diagram styles of that world).

Diversity Enhancement:
Invent a new cultural sphere for each input. If multiple proposals are requested, ensure each has a distinct principle of living, material logic, and aesthetic.

For each proposal, significantly vary:
- Terrain and climate appearance
- Architecture and cityscape shapes
- Primary materials
- Meaning of colors
- Costume silhouettes
- How tools are held, stored, and carried
- Creation of symbols, scripts, patterns, and emblems
- Format of the page layout

Ideation Candidates (not fixed themes, but materials for inspiration):
Environment: Arid lands, cold regions, highlands, wetlands, volcanic ash zones, mirror lakes, misty valleys, high-wind zones, polar night, low gravity, floating strata, glowing mineral caves, etc.
Materials: Paper, bone, ceramics, leather, resin, glass, shell, bamboo, straw, crystals, recycled fabrics, lacquer, ash, feathers, amber, etc.
Culture: Oral traditions, mask culture, scent-based ID, knot-script, shadow puppet records, seasonal migration, silence rituals, dance contracts, etc.
Structure: Folding, wrapping, weaving, hanging, inserting, tying, layering, sealing, engraving, bundling, inflating, etc.

Mandatory Elements:
1. Worldview Board (symbolic landscape, cityscape, lifestyle tools, emblems, color rules, shape language).
2. Character Setting Materials (full-body standing pose, role-conveying outfits, detail diagrams for equipment/back view/belongings).
3. World-Character Connection (ensure clothes/gear logic stems from the world's tech/faith/environment).
4. Page Design (layout varies with worldview, using appropriate diagram methods and minimal labels/symbols).

Quality Standards:
- Not generic fantasy; the world's origins must be visible.
- Cohesive culture across characters and backgrounds.
- Decorations must have lifestyle, faith, or functional meanings.
- Visual differentiation between multiple world proposals.

Visual Presentation:
- High resolution, anime style, delicate line art, clean cel painting.
- Mixed layout of world boards + full-body character + tool details.
- Minimal text, prioritizing visual concept art sheets.

Final Goal:
Ensure a design where the world's establishment, resident life, material constraints, cultural meanings, and community rules are palpable. Create a unified sense where backgrounds and characters are instantly recognizable as belonging to the same unique world.

entries.title: Whimsical Cottage Valley Sunrise
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cozy storybook-style countryside illustration at golden-hour sunrise, painted in a soft whimsical digital gouache and watercolor look. Show a small cottage nestled in a lush green valley, with a warm red-orange tiled roof, cream plaster walls, a stone chimney releasing a thin curl of smoke, a tiny front porch, and a small upper balcony. Place the cottage in the lower right area of the composition, surrounded by an abundant cottage garden full of wildflowers and tall grasses. In front of the house, show 1 young girl in a simple light blue dress and apron, gently sweeping the path with a broom. Near the porch, include 1 black cat sitting upright. Beside the path, include 1 small stone well with a wooden roof. On the right side near the house, show 1 laundry line with 2 white sheets hanging to dry. The foreground should be richly framed with leafy branches and flowering plants, especially 2 large clusters of overhanging leaves in the top left and top right corners, creating a natural vignette. A winding dirt path should begin in the foreground, pass by the cottage, and snake into the distance through rolling meadows and forested hills. Fill the midground and background with layered green hills, pine and deciduous trees, soft morning mist settling in the valleys, and distant mountains fading into atmospheric haze. Use warm sunlight streaming from the left, illuminating the grass and rooftops with soft golden highlights, with pastel peach clouds in a pale blue sky. The mood should feel peaceful, idyllic, nostalgic, and magical, like a children's book landscape. No text, no border, highly detailed foliage, painterly linework, balanced composition, square format.

entries.title: Handwritten Japanese Cafe Photo Overlay
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the cafe photo composition, lighting, food, cup, plate, table, and background unchanged, and turn it into an emotive social-media style annotated photo by overlaying handwritten white Japanese copy directly on the image. Add 1 main headline in the upper left with an underline and small accent marks: 「朝のごほうび」. Beneath it, add 1 short subcopy block in 2 lines: 「焼きたての香りで / 今日がはじまる。」. Then add 6 handwritten callout notes with sketchy arrows pointing to details in the scene: 1) 「バターの香り、ふわり...」 pointing to the croissant, 2) 「先端まできれい」 pointing to the left tip of the croissant, 3) 「表面の照りがたまらない〜」 pointing to the glossy top surface, 4) 「さくっと軽い層」 pointing to the upper right area of the croissant, 5) 「この立体感が好き」 near the plate edge, 6) 「やさしい一口」 pointing to the cup. Add 1 closing handwritten sentence near the lower right: 「なんでもない朝が、少し好きになる。♡」. Make all typography look like casual marker or chalk-pen handwriting with thin uneven strokes, soft organic spacing, doodled underlines, arrows, and small decorative marks. Keep the text integrated naturally into the empty wall and tabletop spaces, with a warm minimal Japanese lifestyle ad / UGC feel.

entries.title: Pastel Anime Nail Artist at Desk
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft pastel anime-style illustration of a young woman doing nail art at a cozy desk in a sunlit bedroom studio. She is seated at a wooden table, facing slightly left, with shoulder-length wavy hair in light ash brown, full bangs, and a gentle, delicate appearance. Her face is obscured by a centered square blur block, but the rest of her pose is visible: she holds a small artificial nail tip in one hand and a thin detail brush in the other, painting it carefully. She wears a loose lavender cardigan over a light cream top. The scene is warm, airy, and feminine, with watercolor-like textures, fine linework, and soft natural morning light coming through the windows. On the desk are exactly 7 nail polish bottles in pastel purple and pink tones, 4 manicure tools laid horizontally, 8 sample nail tips arranged on a white work mat, 2 small open glitter or gel pots near the center front, 2 stacked cosmetic jars near her hands, 1 white UV/LED nail lamp with a pale blue glow on the left, and 1 stack of round cotton pads on the right. Behind her is a neatly arranged creative workspace: a bookshelf with books and containers, a window ledge with 2 potted plants and 1 small framed photo on the left, another window area on the right with 2 small potted plants, pale mauve curtains, and a softly made bed with blush-toned pillows in the background. Include a wooden chair, tidy shelves under the desk with books, and a small display card at the front right showing 5 decorated nail designs in pastel pink and purple. Use a dreamy shojo illustration aesthetic, clean composition, muted pink-beige-lilac palette, gentle highlights in the hair, and a calm handmade lifestyle atmosphere.
